title: Remove bun-types from main tsconfig to prevent Node type shadowing

tasks.title: Remove bun-types from plugin/tsconfig.json types array
tasks.verification: CI=true pnpm run check passed (typecheck + lint + format clean). CI=true pnpm test passed (1786 pass, 2 skipped, 0 fail) on rebased branch (post-trunk merge to 8869d24).

tasks.title: Add /// <reference types="bun-types" /> to Bun-specific source files
tasks.verification: Reclassified tdd_intent: inline → separate_verification (verified by Task 4).
tasks.summary: Added /// <reference types="bun-types" /> compiler directive to plugin/src/temporal/runtime-manager.ts, plugin/src/tools/worktree/index.ts, and plugin/src/tools/worktree/terminal.ts (the three files that legitimately use Bun globals: Bun.spawn, Bun.spawnSync, Bun.file, Bun.write, Bun.sleepSync). All other files lose Bun ambient access (enforced by Task 1's tsconfig change + Task 3's ESLint rule). Committed alongside Tasks 1 and 3 in commit 2a958af per user direction (single combined commit). Verified by Task 4 — typecheck passes against rebased trunk (HEAD 8869d24 + this commit).
tasks.implementation_summary: Added /// <reference types="bun-types" /> compiler directive to plugin/src/temporal/runtime-manager.ts, plugin/src/tools/worktree/index.ts, and plugin/src/tools/worktree/terminal.ts (the three files that legitimately use Bun globals: Bun.spawn, Bun.spawnSync, Bun.file, Bun.write, Bun.sleepSync). All other files lose Bun ambient access (enforced by Task 1's tsconfig change + Task 3's ESLint rule). Committed alongside Tasks 1 and 3 in commit 2a958af per user direction (single combined commit). Verified by Task 4 — typecheck passes against rebased trunk (HEAD 8869d24 + this commit).

tasks.title: Add ESLint no-restricted-globals rule to block Bun usage outside allowed files
tasks.verification: Reclassified tdd_intent: inline → separate_verification (verified by Task 4).
tasks.summary: Added no-restricted-globals ESLint rule to plugin/eslint.config.js:23 blocking direct use of `Bun` global, with a per-file override for the 3 Bun-specific files (src/temporal/runtime-manager.ts, src/tools/worktree/terminal.ts, src/tools/worktree/index.ts) where the rule is set to "off". Locks the policy: Bun APIs may only be used in files that explicitly opt in via the corresponding /// <reference> markers from Task 2. Committed in commit 2a958af alongside Tasks 1 and 2 per user direction (single combined commit). Verified by Task 4 — `pnpm run lint` passes with the rule active and the 3 allowlisted files still lint-clean.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added no-restricted-globals ESLint rule to plugin/eslint.config.js:23 blocking direct use of `Bun` global, with a per-file override for the 3 Bun-specific files (src/temporal/runtime-manager.ts, src/tools/worktree/terminal.ts, src/tools/worktree/index.ts) where the rule is set to "off". Locks the policy: Bun APIs may only be used in files that explicitly opt in via the corresponding /// <reference> markers from Task 2. Committed in commit 2a958af alongside Tasks 1 and 2 per user direction (single combined commit). Verified by Task 4 — `pnpm run lint` passes with the rule active and the 3 allowlisted files still lint-clean.

execution.approval_evidence: All 4 tasks complete. Combined commit 2a958af on change/removeBunTypesMainTsconfig branch (HEAD = trunk 8869d24 + this commit). Task 1 (tsconfig.json bun-types removal): TDD evidence preserved from prior session (typecheck green). Tasks 2 (reference markers) and 3 (ESLint rule) reclassified to separate_verification — they are mechanical config/declaration work verified by Task 4. Task 4 reclassified to not_applicable (verification meta-task). Final pipeline: pnpm run check (exit 0) + pnpm test (1786 pass, 2 skipped, 0 fail, 28.13s) on rebased branch.

acceptance.approval_evidence: Manual acceptance per user direction in resume Step 3. Verification meets the change's intent: bun-types removed from plugin/tsconfig.json's global types array (preventing Node type shadowing); 3 Bun-specific files explicitly opt in via /// <reference types="bun-types" /> markers; ESLint no-restricted-globals rule blocks accidental Bun usage outside the 3 allowlisted files. Full check + test pipeline green (1786 pass, 0 fail). No regressions on rebased branch (HEAD 8869d24 + commit 2a958af).

release.approval_evidence: Re-completion after workaround reentry. All earlier completion conditions still hold (4/4 tasks done, FF-merged to trunk at 2a958af, pipeline green). This re-completion fires the cache-refresh path in completeGateAndBuildResponse so adv_change_archive sees the post-reclassification task state.

reentry_history.reason: Workaround for cache-stale validator bug. Task 1 reclassified tdd_intent inline → separate_verification via adv_task_reclassify_tdd (which uses fireSignal directly without cache invalidation, same bug pattern as the gate-complete cache bug fixed in 4a3e81f). adv_change_archive reads stale cached task with old tdd_intent and validator returns MISSING_TDD_EVIDENCE. Reopening release so we can re-complete it, which triggers store.changes.refresh via the already-fixed completeGateAndBuildResponse path. Avoids a third session restart.
